title: lycopodium selago f. patens
intro: Lycopodium selago f. patens is a subspecies of the Lycopodium selago plant, a type of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago f. patens include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
